subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face towards the Divine Countenance! These are the Days of God, wherein a single moment equateth with centuries and ages [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المقبل الی الوجه ایام ایام الله است بیک آن آن قرون و اعصار معادله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
